requirement_topic.en: CE-Aligned Electrical Safety and BESS Battery Standards
requirement_topic.zh: CE对应电气安全与BESS电池标准
requirement_topic.zht: CE對應電氣安全與BESS電池標準

summary.en: Serbia operates a CE-oriented product-safety framework for in-scope electrical equipment while remaining an EU-candidate aligning to EN/IEC adoptions. For a lithium-ion BESS, the Low Voltage Directive model is normally relevant when rated voltage falls in scope, while TS EN IEC 62619:2022 is used as the safety standard for industrial secondary lithium cell and battery systems. IEC 62933-5-2:2020 is the current IEC system-safety framework for grid-integrated electrical energy storage systems; it is useful technical evidence, but exporters should verify whether Serbia-side project requirements, technical catalogue references, or contracts make it mandatory.
summary.zh: 塞尔维亚对适用电气设备实施与CE对应的产品安全框架，同时作为欧盟候选国对齐EN/IEC采标。对于锂离子BESS，额定电压落入范围时通常需要考虑低电压指令模式，TS EN IEC 62619:2022通常用于工业二次锂电芯和电池安全。IEC 62933-5-2:2020是并网电气储能系统的IEC系统安全框架，可作为重要技术证据；出口商应核实塞尔维亚项目要求、技术清单或合同是否将其列为强制要求。
summary.zht: 塞爾維亞對適用電氣設備實施與CE對應的產品安全框架，同時作為歐盟候選國對齊EN/IEC採標。對於鋰離子BESS，額定電壓落入範圍時通常需要考慮低電壓指令模式，TS EN IEC 62619:2022通常用於工業二次鋰電芯和電池安全。IEC 62933-5-2:2020是併網電氣儲能系統的IEC系統安全框架，可作為重要技術證據；出口商應核實塞爾維亞項目要求、技術目錄或合約是否將其列為強制要求。

standards_or_laws: Serbia CE-oriented low-voltage product-safety rules for in-scope electrical equipment

summary.en: China commonly uses GB 44240-2024 as the compulsory safety standard for lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage, GB/T 36276-2023 as a recommended standard for lithium-ion batteries for electric energy storage, and GB/T 36558 for electrochemical energy storage systems connected to power systems. These GB documents support technical comparison but do not replace Serbia CE-oriented conformity assessment, EN-adoption evidence, or project-owner requirements.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用GB 44240-2024作为电力储能用锂离子电池和电池组强制性安全标准，使用GB/T 36276-2023作为电力储能用锂离子电池推荐性标准，并使用GB/T 36558管理接入电力系统的电化学储能系统。这些GB文件可支持技术对照，但不能替代塞尔维亚CE对应符合性评估、EN采标证据或项目业主要求。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用GB 44240-2024作為電力儲能用鋰離子電池和電池組強制性安全標準，使用GB/T 36276-2023作為電力儲能用鋐離子電池推薦性標準，並使用GB/T 36558管理接入電力系統的電化學儲能系統。這些GB文件可支持技術對照，但不能替代塞爾維亞CE對應符合性評估、EN採標證據或項目業主要求。

gap.en: A China GB 44240 or GB/T 36276 report is not the same as a Serbian market technical file. Exporters should map voltage scope, applicable CE-oriented Serbian product regulations, TS EN IEC 62619 test evidence, IEC 62933 system-risk evidence, Serbian-language instructions, lab accreditation, and Declaration of Conformity responsibilities before placing equipment on the Serbian market.
gap.zh: 中国GB 44240或GB/T 36276检测报告不等同于塞尔维亚市场技术文件。出口商在塞尔维亚投放设备前，应逐项确认电压范围、适用的塞尔维亚CE对齐产品法规、TS EN IEC 62619测试证据、IEC 62933系统风险证据、塞尔维亚语说明书、实验室资质以及符合性声明责任。
gap.zht: 中國GB 44240或GB/T 36276檢測報告不等同於塞爾維亞市場技術文件。出口商在塞爾維亞投放設備前，應逐項確認電壓範圍、適用的塞爾維亞CE對齊產品法規、TS EN IEC 62619測試證據、IEC 62933系統風險證據、塞爾維亞語說明書、實驗室資質以及符合性聲明責任。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope electrical equipment under Serbia CE-oriented product rules; TS EN IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 are standards-based evidence unless Serbian law, tender, insurer, or project contract makes them mandatory
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for in-scope electric-energy-storage lithium-ion cells and batteries; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558 are recommended GB/T standards but may be required by projects or grid review

source.publisher: EUR-Lex; Institute for Standardization of Serbia (ISS); IEC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat China GB battery safety evidence as a substitute for Serbia CE-oriented product compliance. Build a Serbia technical file around applicable product rules, TS EN IEC 62619 battery evidence, IEC 62933 system-safety evidence where relevant, and project-specific ISS or owner requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将中国GB电池安全证据视为塞尔维亚CE对齐产品合规替代文件。应围绕适用产品法规、TS EN IEC 62619电池证据、适用时的IEC 62933系统安全证据，以及项目特定ISS或业主要求建立塞尔维亚技术文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將中國GB電池安全證據視為塞爾維亞CE對齊產品合規替代文件。應圍繞適用產品法規、TS EN IEC 62619電池證據、適用時的IEC 62933系統安全證據，以及項目特定ISS或業主要求建立塞爾維亞技術文件。
